hero.title: The World's Healthiest Ergonomic Office Chair
hero.subtitle: Active sitting solutions designed to promote movement, improve posture, and reduce back pain. NEAT Certified by Mayo Clinic.

features.title: Why CoreChair?
features.ergonomicDesc: Patented active sitting mechanism with up to 14 degrees of movement
features.activeDesc: Certified by Mayo Clinic for active sitting benefits
features.comfortDesc: Exceeds BIFMA/ANSI durability standards with 8-year warranty

about.title: About CoreChair
about.story: Founded in 2008 by Patrick Harrison, CoreChair combines expertise in kinesiology and sports medicine to revolutionize the way we sit. Our patented technology promotes healthy movement and proper posture throughout your workday.
about.mission: Our mission is to eliminate the health risks associated with prolonged sitting while maintaining comfort and productivity. Recommended for persons with pre-existing back pain and for preventative strengthening.
